steps.t: Orcs fleeing from Dol Guldur have taken refuge in a cavern in the Mirk-eaves. Alfirimbes has asked you to find the fleeing Orcs in the Mirk-eaves cave…
Alfirimbes is waiting to speak with you in Echad Sirion. You have cleansed the Hall of Lights of the dangerous glow-worm infestation and should return…
